component.name: CodeBlock
component.description: Brand-tinted container for displaying code snippets, command-line examples, or config blocks with optional header and copy-to-clipboard button.

useCases: Inline command-line instructions in setup guides

commonPatterns.name: snippet-with-title-and-copy
commonPatterns.description: Most common form — title in the header plus a copy button on the right

commonPatterns.name: headerless-snippet
commonPatterns.description: Tight inline snippet with floating copy button only

commonPatterns.name: manual-composition
commonPatterns.description: Compose primitives directly when you need a custom header layout

antiPatterns.scenario: Using CodeBlock for prose or non-code content
antiPatterns.reason: Brand-tinted background and monospace font signal source code; using it for body text confuses meaning
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a regular paragraph or Card for prose content

antiPatterns.scenario: Wrapping a CodeSnippet inside another CodeBlock
antiPatterns.reason: CodeSnippet is itself a CodeBlock; nesting creates duplicated borders and backgrounds
antiPatterns.alternative: Pick one — CodeSnippet for convenience, or compose primitives directly

slots.header: CodeBlockHeader for a title bar (label-sm text on brand-foreground) with optional copy button
slots.content: CodeBlockContent renders the code in monospace with horizontal scroll for overflow
slots.copy: CodeBlockCopy renders a button that copies a string to the clipboard, briefly swapping to a check icon on success

interactions.copy: CodeBlockCopy writes its value to the clipboard via navigator.clipboard.writeText and shows a Check icon for 1500ms

responsive.mobile: Content scrolls horizontally if code lines exceed the container width

accessibility.role: Generic container; copy button has aria-label='Copy to clipboard'
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Copy button is focusable and activatable via Enter or Space
accessibility.screenReader: Code content is read as plain text; the copy button announces its purpose
accessibility.focusManagement: Standard focus ring on the copy button via focus-visible

rules: Use CodeSnippet for single-snippet usage with optional title; compose primitives directly when you need custom header content
Pass the raw code string to CodeBlockCopy via the value prop — do NOT pass the rendered children
Brand-tinted background pairs with text/brand-foreground tokens; do not override these to keep visual coherence with other brand-tinted surfaces
Content uses font-mono + whitespace-pre — preserve original indentation and line breaks in the source string

aiHints.context: Use when displaying source code, terminal commands, or config samples in documentation or instructional UI. Prefer CodeSnippet for one-off snippets; use the primitives directly only when a custom header layout is needed. The component is brand-tinted by design — do not customize colors.
